age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering, Retired Government servant in pay level 10 and above, Graduate with Bachelor's Degree in Law, Retired officers as Section Officer/Under Secretary/Director/Joint Secretary/Additional Secretary
qualification.details: Consultant Engineer: Bachelor's Degree in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering from a recognized university/reputed institute. Retired Government servant from any Ministry/Department or its attached/subordinate offices of Central/State/UT Governments/Autonomous bodies/Statutory Bodies or PSUs having served in pay level 10 and above (as per 7th CPC) with requisite qualification. The retired person not below the rank of Assistant Executive Engineer from pay level L-10 and above as per 7th CPC. Record of proven experience of at least 15 to 20 years in Government organization such as CPWD, NPCC, HUDCO, NBCC, PWD etc or any other Central/state Government organization or statutory body is mandatory. Consultant Admin: Retired officers of Central/State/Govt./Attached and subordinate offices or Autonomous bodies of Government of India OR PSUs who had served as Section Officer/Under Secretary/Director/Joint Secretary/Additional Secretary having experience in Establishment/Administration. Adequate administrative experience and a working knowledge of government rules and procedures. Consultant Legal: Graduate in any discipline with minimum Bachelor's Degree in Law or any equivalent degree from a recognised Institution/University and duly registered as an Advocate from State Bar Council. Retired Government servants from any Ministry/Department or its attached/subordinate offices of Central/State/UT Governments, Autonomous Bodies, Statutory Bodies or PSUs having served in pay level of 10 and above (as per 7th CPC) with requisite qualification. Minimum 10 years' experience of handling court cases related to service matters in any Central or State Government Ministry/Department/PSU. Experience in the service matters/Recruitment/Tender matters etc. and dealing with all type of legal matters. Experience in Govt. Sector/Judicial body/Regulatory/Quasi-Judicial body Etc./dealing with all type of legal matters etc. Experience in legal drafting and administrative coordination. Experience in preparing draft counter replies for filing before District Court/High Court/Supreme Court/CAT & other courts and get them vetted from legal perspective.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICSSR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.icssr.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSSR Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ICSSR Consultant posts is 04 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Consultant posts in the Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ICSSR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ICSSR Consultant Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant posts is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the different types of Consultant posts available?
faq.answer: The available Consultant posts are Consultant Engineer, Consultant Admin, and Consultant Legal.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ICSSR Consultant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICSSR Consultant posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant Engineer post, a Bachelor's Degree in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering is required, along with specific experience for retired government servants.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICSSR Consultant posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ICSSR, which is https://www.icssr.org.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Consultant positions is Contractual.
